properties: Epidorkis parviflora, also known as the Small-flowered Epidorkis, is a plant species that has been studied for its potential therapeutic properties. Its roots and leaves have been traditionally used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The plant is rich in bioactive compounds, including flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are believed to contribute to its therapeutic effects.
